title: Step 2: Positioning the DefectFinder Object
description:
Step 2: Positioning the DefectFinder Object

Step 2: Positioning the DefectFinder Object

You should now see a DefectFinder object similar to the one shown below:

New DefectFinder Object

Click the name label of the DefectFinder object and, while holding the mouse down, drag the DefectFinder object to the position where you would like the top left position of the search window to reside.

Resize the DefectFinder object search window as required using the search window size handles.
